description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone monument featuring a sculpted figure at the top, likely representing a religious or historical figure. The obelisk rises from a multi-tiered, rectangular base with beveled edges and decorative reliefs, including arched motifs and floral patterns. The central shaft is adorned with carved details and inscriptions, some of which are weathered and partially legible. The statue at the summit is draped in flowing robes, adding a sense of solemnity and reverence. The surface shows signs of aging, with discoloration and patina typical of outdoor stone structures. The overall design suggests it serves as a memorial or commemorative marker, commonly found in parks, cemeteries, or public squares.
description: A tall, ornate stone monument with a sculpted figure atop a decorated, multi-tiered base, featuring carved reliefs and inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the statue atop the obelisk, with detailed carvings and a prominent arched relief on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the statue and the plain, slightly weathered surface of the base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated shaft, side reliefs, and visible weathering on the stone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the main inscription panel and additional decorative motifs on the base.
attribute_inscription: There are visible inscriptions on the front and side panels of the base, carved in a serif style, likely in English. The text is partially weathered and not fully legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative reliefs and motifs are present on the upper section of the base, including arched patterns and floral designs. The statue at the top is also an ornamental feature.
attribute_base_design: The base is multi-tiered and rectangular with beveled edges, featuring decorative reliefs, arched motifs, and inscription panels. The lowest tier is broad and slightly weathered, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is crowned with a sculpted figure in flowing robes, standing atop a small plinth. The finish is rough and weathered, with no additional decorations at the very top.
